declaration-no-important.message: !important is prohibited - use specificity or Material component variants instead

max-nesting-depth.message: Nesting too deep (max 4 levels) - refactor or use Material components

selector-max-id.message: ID selectors are prohibited - use classes instead

comment-word-disallowed-list.message: ::ng-deep is deprecated and breaks encapsulation. Target Material classes directly or use CSS variables.

selector-pseudo-element-disallowed-list.message: ::ng-deep is deprecated. Use CSS custom properties (--md-sys-color-*) or target Material classes directly.

declaration-property-value-disallowed-li.message: MUST use MD3 4px grid spacing (4px, 8px, 12px, 16px, 20px, 24px, etc.). For dynamic values, use calc() with design tokens.

color-no-hex.message: Hex colors are prohibited - MUST use MD3 design tokens (--md-sys-color-*) for theme support.

function-disallowed-list.message: Color functions are prohibited - MUST use MD3 design tokens (--md-sys-color-*) for theme support.

selector-pseudo-class-disallowed-list.message: ::ng-deep is deprecated. Use CSS custom properties or target Material classes directly.

property-disallowed-list.message: The 'clip' property is deprecated. Use 'clip-path' instead.

declaration-block-no-duplicate-propertie.message: Duplicate property found. Remove the duplicate.

font-family-no-missing-generic-family-ke.message: Font family MUST include a generic fallback (e.g., sans-serif, serif, monospace)

selector-max-compound-selectors.message: Too many compound selectors (max 5) - simplify your selector

selector-max-specificity.message: Selector specificity too high - avoid overly specific selectors

declaration-block-no-shorthand-property-.message: Shorthand property overriding longhand - remove the duplicate

no-unknown-animations.message: Unknown animation name - define @keyframes or remove animation

keyframe-block-no-duplicate-selectors.message: Duplicate keyframe selector - merge or remove duplicate

scss/at-extend-no-missing-placeholder.message: @extend should only extend placeholders (%) not classes (.)

scss/at-if-no-null.message: Comparing to null is unreliable - use 'not' or comparison operators
